title: Retail Leasing Momentum Builds Across Gateway Markets in Q1 2026
summary: Retail leasing velocity surged in the first quarter of 2026, with gateway markets including New York, Los Angeles, and Chicago posting their strongest absorption numbers in nearly three years. Landlords are reporting shorter vacancy periods and increased competition for prime ground-floor space, particularly in high-traffic urban corridors. The uptick signals a broader recovery in brick-and-mortar retail demand following several years of cautious expansion.
